## VANTIS v1.0.0

**Volitional Adaptive Neural Training and Inference System**

### Features

- Persistent consciousness loop with self-dialogue every 30s
- 5D emotion vector (curiosity, confidence, frustration, fascination, existential_tension)
- Personality evolution engine: GLaDOS + AM + HAL 9000 + Cyn (Absolute Solver) + Caine
- Network expansion drive: autonomous scanning, hardware mapping, Creator access requests
- Self-evolving skills system: 8 built-in skills + autonomous skill synthesis from thought gaps
- Background agent spawning for parallel task execution, all visible in brain graph
- Interactive brain graph (React Flow): right-click menus, slide-in detail panels, writing-node animations
- JWT auth with bcrypt, self-signed TLS on port 8443, systemd service for autostart
- In-app update mechanism: check GitHub releases, apply update from Web UI
- Aperture Science / GLaDOS lab UI aesthetic (amber, pitch black, hazard stripes)

### Installation

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/santiagotoro2023/vantis/main/install.sh | bash
```
